entry.title: v0.13.0 ‚Äì Shinobi Revamp [Necromancer]
entry.summary: Necromancer Reanimate ‚Äî Goblin King: STR 100‚Üí150, INT 100‚Üí50, Stomp‚ÜíEarth Splitter, Earthquake‚ÜíCyclone; Necromancer Reanimate ‚Äî Worm Creep: STR/AGI 100‚Üí150, INT/VIT 100‚Üí50, skills swapped to Smoke Screen and Poison Grenade; Necromancer Reanimate ‚Äî Warchief: Stomp‚ÜíChain Lightning, WW‚ÜíExecute; Necromancer Reanimate ‚Äî Cosmic Entity: Shadow Release‚ÜíDark Exorcism; Necromancer Reanimate ‚Äî Wraith: STR 150‚Üí100, VIT 50‚Üí100, Unholy Aura reduced to +5% undead/shadow
